description_long: This is a dark-colored athletic sneaker with a mesh upper, featuring a prominent white Nike Swoosh on the side and the word 'AIR' in bold white text on the heel strap. The shoe has a visibly rugged and deconstructed design, with exposed stitching, frayed edges, and layered materials, characteristic of Off-White collaborations. The lacing system is standard, with dark laces threaded through reinforced eyelets and a tongue that displays a red Nike logo tag. The midsole appears cushioned and robust, suitable for urban walking or running, and the outsole is thick, providing substantial grip. The interior lining looks soft and padded for comfort, while the overall silhouette is low-cut and sporty. The shoe shows signs of wear, with some fraying and discoloration, especially around the collar and tongue.
description: A dark, deconstructed Nike sneaker with a mesh upper, bold white Swoosh, and 'AIR' branding on the heel, showing visible wear and frayed edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mesh toe box, laces, and tongue with a red Nike logo tag, as well as visible fraying and wear on the upper.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large white Swoosh, translucent support cage, and 'AIR' text on the heel strap, with layered materials and exposed stitching.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'AIR' branding on the heel strap, padded collar, and the worn, frayed interior lining.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the support cage, mesh upper, and additional branding details, with visible wear and layered construction.
attribute_logo: Red Nike logo tag on the tongue, large white Nike Swoosh on the side, 'AIR' text in white on the heel strap
